regional.available_locales_help: Select which languages your users can choose. You cannot disable the default language or remove a language in use.
regional.locale_in_use: Language {locale} is in use by {users} user(s) and {companies} company(ies). Migrate them before removing.

regional.locale_help: Language used throughout the interface and forms.
regional.currency_help: Default currency for new documents (quotes, products).
regional.default_locale_help: Used when no other preference is detected.
regional.confirm_company_locale_description: This change affects the interface and forms for all users in this company. Existing data will remain unchanged.

will_change.tax_id_labels: Forms will use the new country's document format
will_change.phone_mask: Phone masks will follow the new country's standard
will_change.date_format: Dates will be displayed in the new country's format
will_change.address_fields: Address fields will adjust to the new country (e.g., neighborhood only appears in pt-BR)
will_change.ui_language: Interface text will switch to the new language

wont_change.existing_phones: Existing phone numbers remain valid (E.164 storage)
wont_change.existing_tax_ids: Existing documents (CPF, CNPJ, SSN, EIN) remain unchanged
